prompt: Create a React component for an analytics dashboard sidebar. It should show: daily active users (4,231), revenue ($12,840), churn rate (2.1%), and NPS score (67). Include small sparkline-style trend indicators and percentage changes. Export as a single JSX file.

assertions.text: Does NOT import external UI libraries (MUI, Chakra, Ant Design, etc.) — pure React with inline styles or minimal CSS
Includes all 4 metrics: DAU (4,231), Revenue ($12,840), Churn (2.1%), NPS (67)
Includes an SVG sparkline component (not just dots or bars)
Churn rate decrease is correctly flagged as positive/good (not red)
Does NOT use Inter or system-ui as the primary font (uses a distinctive/alternative font)
Has a clear aesthetic direction beyond generic dark dashboard (editorial, newspaper, terminal, etc.)
